text:
be of hunters, the people inhabiting the Mekala mountain, heroic
persons, rulers and their equals as well as the forest-denizens.
Should it occur in Sign Virgo, it would afflict crops, poets, writers
scribes, musicians, people of the Asmaka and Tripura regions as
well as countries abounding in paddy fields.
[The Sign Sirhha stands for a mountainous region, and Virgo
is represented by a virgin holding corn etc. As (his Rasi belongs
to Mercury, whose exaltation and Mulatrikona are here, his
characteristics are naturally affected. The metre is ^P^fc^PfTT.]
llVoM
If the eclipse occurs in Sign Libra, people of AvantI and
Aparanta regions (i.e. the western borders near the Sahya moun-
tain), virtuous persons, traders, inhabitants of the Da^arna country,
Maru and Kacchapa regions will come to grief. If it takes place
in Sign Scorpio, people of Udumbara, Madra and Cola, the Yau-
dheya tribe, fighters that use poisoned weapons and trees will be
destroyed.
